taskTemplates.title: Assign Owner
taskTemplates.trigger: A framework item has no assigned owner in the organization workspace.

taskTemplates.title: Assign Reviewer
taskTemplates.trigger: A framework item requires review but has no reviewer assigned in the organization workspace.

taskTemplates.title: Upload Evidence
taskTemplates.trigger: A required evidence item has not been uploaded for a test, control, or policy.

taskTemplates.title: Review Policy
taskTemplates.trigger: A required policy has not been reviewed within its defined review frequency.

taskTemplates.title: Approve Policy
taskTemplates.trigger: A required policy is drafted or reviewed but not approved in the organization workspace.

taskTemplates.title: Perform Access Review
taskTemplates.trigger: Quarterly user access review evidence is missing or access review has not been completed.

taskTemplates.title: Perform Privileged Access Review
taskTemplates.trigger: Privileged access review evidence is missing or privileged access has not been reviewed.

taskTemplates.title: Verify MFA Enforcement
taskTemplates.trigger: MFA configuration or enrollment evidence is missing, incomplete, or indicates unenrolled users.

taskTemplates.title: Review Access Provisioning
taskTemplates.trigger: Access provisioning approvals are missing for sampled new users or access changes.

taskTemplates.title: Review Access Deprovisioning
taskTemplates.trigger: Terminated or transferred user access removal evidence is missing or incomplete.

taskTemplates.title: Complete Patch Verification
taskTemplates.trigger: Patch compliance evidence is missing or critical patches remain unresolved beyond policy expectations.

taskTemplates.title: Review Vulnerability Scan
taskTemplates.trigger: Vulnerability scan report or remediation tracker is missing for the review period.

taskTemplates.title: Complete Firewall Review
taskTemplates.trigger: Firewall rule review evidence is missing or broad access rules have not been justified.

taskTemplates.title: Complete Cloud Configuration Review
taskTemplates.trigger: Cloud security posture evidence is missing or open misconfiguration findings are not remediated.

taskTemplates.title: Update Asset Inventory
taskTemplates.trigger: Asset inventory evidence is missing, stale, or does not include ownership information.

taskTemplates.title: Review Endpoint Protection
taskTemplates.trigger: Endpoint protection report is missing or shows unmanaged or unhealthy endpoints.

taskTemplates.title: Review Production Change
taskTemplates.trigger: Production change approval, testing, or deployment evidence is missing.

taskTemplates.title: Review Code Approval Evidence
taskTemplates.trigger: Pull request review or branch protection evidence is missing.

taskTemplates.title: Review Dependency Scan
taskTemplates.trigger: Dependency scan evidence is missing or critical vulnerable dependencies are unresolved.

taskTemplates.title: Review Security Logs
taskTemplates.trigger: Log review evidence is missing for the review period.

taskTemplates.title: Verify Security Alerts
taskTemplates.trigger: Alert rule list, alert review tickets, or escalation evidence is missing.

taskTemplates.title: Review Log Retention
taskTemplates.trigger: Log retention configuration or log access review evidence is missing.

taskTemplates.title: Complete Incident Response Tabletop
taskTemplates.trigger: Incident response tabletop exercise has not been completed within the expected review period.

taskTemplates.title: Review Incident Tickets
taskTemplates.trigger: Incident tickets are missing required investigation, containment, remediation, or closure evidence.

taskTemplates.title: Complete Post-Incident Review
taskTemplates.trigger: A significant incident is closed without post-incident review or corrective action tracking.

taskTemplates.title: Complete Vendor Review
taskTemplates.trigger: Vendor due diligence or annual vendor review evidence is missing for an in-scope vendor.

taskTemplates.title: Review Vendor Access
taskTemplates.trigger: Vendor access export, approval, or periodic review evidence is missing.

taskTemplates.title: Complete Backup Verification
taskTemplates.trigger: Backup job report or backup failure remediation evidence is missing.

taskTemplates.title: Complete Backup Test
taskTemplates.trigger: Backup restore test has not been completed within the expected review period.

taskTemplates.title: Complete Disaster Recovery Test
taskTemplates.trigger: Disaster recovery test report or recovery objective evidence is missing.

taskTemplates.title: Review Security Awareness Training
taskTemplates.trigger: Security awareness training content or completion report is missing.

taskTemplates.title: Review Policy Acknowledgements
taskTemplates.trigger: Policy acknowledgement report or policy distribution evidence is missing.

taskTemplates.title: Review Encryption Configuration
taskTemplates.trigger: Encryption configuration or data flow documentation is missing.

taskTemplates.title: Review Data Retention
taskTemplates.trigger: Data retention schedule or deletion and archival records are missing.
